CVE-2005-0837.title: IceCast 2.20 allows remote attackers to bypass the XSL parser and ...
CVE-2005-0837.description: IceCast 2.20 allows remote attackers to bypass the XSL parser and obtain the source for XSL files via a request for a .xsl file with a trailing . (dot).

CVE-2005-0838.title: Multiple buffer overflows in the XSL parser for IceCast 2.20 may  ...
CVE-2005-0838.description: Multiple buffer overflows in the XSL parser for IceCast 2.20 may allow attackers to cause a denial of service and possibly execute arbitrary code via (1) a long test value in an xsl:when tag, (2) a long test value in an xsl:if tag, or (3) a long select value in an xsl:value-of tag.
